specific_question: What are the current loyalty reward redemption rates (%) for Gen Z/Millennials versus Gen X/Boomers between Q1 2024 and Q4 2025 at Lee's Market?
answer: For Lee's Market, Gen Z/Millennials redeem at 38%, compared with 29% for Gen X/Boomers between Q1 2024 and Q4 2025.
justification: Higher redemption among younger users reflects stronger digital accessibility and tracking; redesigning with mobile-first reward visibility can elevate both segments redemption activity.
dr_question: What considerations will need to be made when Lee's Market is redesigning its loyalty program by Q2 2026 to serve both Gen Z/Millennial digital preferences and Gen X/Boomer traditional service expectations?
